eSignature platform for sending, signing: eSignature platform for sending, signing, and managing documents.
Create Document From Template & Send Fre: Create Document From Template & Send Free Form Invite
Create Document From Template & Send Rol: Create Document From Template & Send Role-Based Invite
Create Document Group From Template Grou: Create Document Group From Template Group & Send Invite
Cancels an invite to sign a document.
Uploads a document to your SignNow accou: Uploads a document to your SignNow account. Supports PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, images, and more.
Uploads a document and automatically con: Uploads a document and automatically converts text tags into SignNow fillable fields.
Sends an invite to sign an existing docu: Sends an invite to sign an existing document.
Creates a new document from a template a: Creates a new document from a template and sends a free form invite to a signer.
Creates a new document from a template w: Creates a new document from a template with fillable fields and sends an invite to one or more signers by role.
Creates a new document group from a temp: Creates a new document group from a template group and sends an invite to one or more signers.
Make a custom authenticated request to a: Make a custom authenticated request to any SignNow API endpoint.
The ID of the document whose invite you: The ID of the document whose invite you want to cancel.
The reason for cancelling the invite.
The file to upload. Accepted formats: .p: The file to upload. Accepted formats: .pdf, .doc, .docx, .odt, .rtf, .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .gif, .bmp, .xml, .xls, .xlsx, .ppt, .pptx, .ps, .eps. Maximum size: 50 MB.
Enable if your document contains simple: Enable if your document contains simple text tags that should be converted to fillable fields.
The file to upload. Text tags in the doc: The file to upload. Text tags in the document (e.g. {{t:s;r:y;o:"Signer 1";}}) will be converted to fillable fields. Accepted formats: .pdf, .doc, .docx, .odt, .rtf, .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .gif, .bmp, .xml, .xls, .xlsx, .ppt, .pptx, .ps, .eps. Maximum size: 50 MB.
The ID of the document to send for signi: The ID of the document to send for signing.
Must be the email address associated wit: Must be the email address associated with your SignNow account.
One entry per signer role. Each signer n: One entry per signer role. Each signer needs an email, role name, and signing order.
Default email subject for all signers. O: Default email subject for all signers. Overridden by per-signer subject if set.
Default email body for all signers. Over: Default email body for all signers. Overridden by per-signer message if set.
Email addresses to CC on the invite.
Subject line for CC recipient emails.
Body message for CC recipient emails.
The ID of the template to create the doc: The ID of the template to create the document from.
Name for the new document. Defaults to t: Name for the new document. Defaults to the template name if not provided.
Email address of the signer. A free form: Email address of the signer. A free form invite can be sent to the sender's own email address.
Subject line of the invite email sent to: Subject line of the invite email sent to the signer.
Body message of the invite email sent to: Body message of the invite email sent to the signer.
Subject line of the email sent to CC rec: Subject line of the email sent to CC recipients.
Body message of the email sent to CC rec: Body message of the email sent to CC recipients.
Language for the signing session and not: Language for the signing session and notification emails.
URL the signer is redirected to after si: URL the signer is redirected to after signing.
URL that opens when the signer clicks th: URL that opens when the signer clicks the Close button.
Whether to open the redirect URL in a ne: Whether to open the redirect URL in a new tab or the same tab.
One entry per signer role defined in the: One entry per signer role defined in the template. Each signer must have an email and a role name (e.g. "Signer 1").
Default email subject sent to all signer: Default email subject sent to all signers. Overridden by per-signer subject if set.
Default email body sent to all signers. Overridden by per-signer message if set.
Number of days before the invite expires: Number of days before the invite expires (3–180). Defaults to 30.
The unique ID of the document group temp: The unique ID of the document group template.
Name for the new document group.
One entry per signer. Each signer needs: One entry per signer. Each signer needs an email, role name, and the document they are signing within the group. Signing order determines the step sequence.
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: 黑色
Triggers when a document has been upload: Triggers when a document has been uploaded to SignNow.
Triggers when a document has been update: Triggers when a document has been updated.
Triggers when all signers have filled in: Triggers when all signers have filled in and signed the document.
Triggers when a document has been delete: Triggers when a document has been deleted.
Triggers when all signers have filled in: Triggers when all signers have filled in and signed the document group.
